reason: trtexec is not available in PATH on this Windows machine, so TensorRT runtime profiling was done through the TensorRT Python API instead.
old_engine_issue: The old serialized TensorRT engine was incompatible with the current TensorRT runtime serialization version.
solution: A fresh TensorRT engine was rebuilt from ONNX using the currently installed TensorRT Python API and then profiled.
important_note: TensorRT serialized engines are version/runtime dependent. Rebuilding the engine in the current TensorRT environment is the correct fix for incompatible serialization errors.
